name: IRC_CAMP_ASSETS_VL
query: SELECT B.ASSET_ID, B.CAMPAIGN_ID, TL.ASSET_NAME, B.ASSET_TYPE_CODE, B.ASSET_STATUS_CODE, B.PARENT_ASSET_ID, B.SCHEDULED_DATE, B.AUDIENCE_DERIVED_FLAG, B.MESSAGE_DESIGN_ID, B.SITE_NUMBER, B.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, B.CREATED_BY, B.CREATION_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATED_BY, B.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, B.START_DELIVERY_DATE, B.LAST_DELIVERY_DATE, B.FOLLOWUP_DELAY, B.ASSET_FREQUENCY, B.PUBLISH_DEST_CODE, B.SEND_IMMEDIATELY_FLAG FROM IRC_CAMP_ASSETS_B B, IRC_CAMP_ASSETS_TL TL WHERE B.ASSET_ID = TL.ASSET_ID AND TL.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG')
